payload.answer: Admin SQL is in select-only mode. Read queries such as "SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10" are allowed, while destructive queries such as "DELETE FROM memory_cards" are denied.
citations: Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes a current admin SQL access constraint for debugging, not durable personal memory about a user or stable entity.

details: Interpreted the input as an operational permission statement.
Confirmed allowed action: SELECT on memory_cards.
Confirmed denied action: DELETE on memory_cards.

repair_options: If deletion is required, switch out of select-only mode using an authorized workflow.
Use a write-enabled admin interface or approved deletion API instead of direct SQL in select-only mode.
Keep using SELECT statements for inspection and debugging while current restrictions remain in effect.
